description: This API routine returns the bus number corresponding to the specified position in the ordered list (numeric or alphabetic) of non-hidden buses (i.e., star point buses and topological buses are excluded). Dummy buses of multi-section lines are included; hidden star point buses of three-winding transformers are not included; topological buses of buses represented by multiple bus sections are not included. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ibus = ordbus(iord)

parameters.name: iord
parameters.description: Ordinal position; 1 through the number of non-hidden buses in the working case. (input).

error_codes.description: ‘IORD’ outside of range 1 through the number of non-hidden buses in the working case; ‘IBUS’ unchanged.
